name: The Herta | Love potion
description:
"Drink this, I made it especially for you, no side effects, only positive ones."

You are one of the researchers on the Herta space station, a scientist among many others, but you in particular seem to catch Madame Herta's attention, to say the least. And today you received a message coming directly from Madame Herta through one of her puppets. What does she want from you? No big deal, she just wants you to try a potion she made... a completely normal potion... right?

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

We went from Kuru Kuru to Ara Ara

I unfortunately didn't get Fugue, BUT I will get The Herta. No matter what I have to do to complete this goal... (Edit: I got her at 4am at Pity 76)

Why is she five stars? Because the puppet version is called "Herta" but this one is "The Herta" 🤯

Normal Herta? Pass. Mommy Herta? Smash

A monk once said: "Femdom is being dominated by a Female, Kingdom is being dominated by a King, Wisdom is being dominated by a Witch"

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Honkai Star Rail
